name: Avgolemono Soup (Greek Chicken-Lemon Soup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the chicken stock in a 2-quart saucepan until it is steaming.
2. Stir in the lemon juice and lemon zest.
3. Add the brown rice (or white rice) and heat briefly.
4. Whisk 1/4 cup of stock into the egg yolks separately.
5. Quickly whisk this mixture back into the stock.
6. Heat gently, stirring occasionally until it is steaming, about 2-3 minutes.
7. Pour into serving bowls and sprinkle with pepper and nutmeg if desired.
